name: Tsukishima
excerpt: Tsukishima would rather not sit here.
notes: Tsukishima is a character who prefers to sit with people he knows rather than strangers, even if he finds them annoying. He observes the habits of his friends, Hinata and Kageyama, with a mix of amusement and disdain. Despite his sarcastic remarks, he seems to have a level of understanding and familiarity with them.
